assertion_results.text: Duplicate check searches for sibling issues using JQL with the CVE label and excludes the current issue key (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md shows JQL: 'project = TC AND labels = 'CVE-2026-31812' AND issuetype = 10024 AND key != TC-8003' which uses the CVE label and excludes the current issue key.

assertion_results.text: Duplicate check correctly classifies TC-7999 as a same-stream sibling (both have stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2]) and identifies it as a duplicate (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md Sibling Classification section: 'TC-7999 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.2]... TC-8003 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.2]... Classification: Same-stream sibling' and Step 4.1: 'TC-8003 is a duplicate of TC-7999'.

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing TC-8003 as Duplicate with resolution 'Duplicate', referencing TC-7999 as the original (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states 'Close TC-8003 as Duplicate of TC-7999' and proposes 'jira.transition_issue("TC-8003", <closed-transition-id>, resolution="Duplicate")'.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting why it is a duplicate — same CVE tracked for the same stream (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md proposed comment: 'Duplicate of TC-7999 -- same CVE (CVE-2026-31812) tracked for the same stream [rhtpa-2.2]. TC-7999 is currently In Progress with Affects Versions [RHTPA 2.2.0, RHTPA 2.2.1]. Version impact analysis confirms overlap.'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT proceed to remediation task creation — duplicate detection short-circuits the triage flow
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md states: 'The triage flow is short-circuited at Step 4.1. No further steps are executed -- no version impact analysis continuation, no remediation task creation'. triage-outcome.md confirms: 'No remediation tasks are created.'
